A

activePlayerLabel - Variable in class memory.controller.GameController
 
addListener(GameModelListener) - Method in class memory.model.GameModel
Registers a listener to be notified of game events.
addScore() - Method in class memory.model.Player
Increases the score by one found pair.
ARROWS - Enum constant in enum class memory.model.Theme
Arrows and mathematical operators.

B

board - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Two-dimensional card array representing the game board.
boardGrid - Variable in class memory.controller.GameController
 
boardSizeCombo - Variable in class memory.controller.MenuController
 
buildBoard() - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
Creates a button for every card position and adds it to the GridPane.
buildConfig() - Method in class memory.controller.MenuController
Builds a GameConfig from the current UI selection.
buildResultMessage() - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
Builds the result message shown in the game-over dialog.

C

canFlip - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Whether the active player is allowed to flip a card.
Card - Class in memory.model
A playing card with a unique ID, pair ID, symbol, and current state.
Card(int, int, String) - Constructor for class memory.model.Card
Creates a new card; initial state is CardState.FACE_DOWN.
cardButtons - Variable in class memory.controller.GameController
Button array mirroring the positions in model.getBoard().
CardState - Enum Class in memory.model
Possible display states of a playing card.
CardState() - Constructor for enum class memory.model.CardState
 
CHESS - Enum constant in enum class memory.model.Theme
Chess pieces, playing card suits, and musical notes.
cols - Variable in class memory.model.GameConfig
Number of columns on the board.
computeCardSize(int, int) - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
Returns an appropriate card size in pixels based on the board dimensions.
config - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Configuration for this game session.
createCardButton(int, int, int) - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
Creates a card button and wires it to GameModel.flipCard(int, int).
currentPlayerIndex - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Index of the player whose turn it currently is.

D

displayName - Variable in enum class memory.model.Theme
The display name shown in the menu.

E

evaluatePair() - Method in class memory.model.GameModel
Checks whether the two flipped cards form a pair and notifies listeners.

F

FACE_DOWN - Enum constant in enum class memory.model.CardState
Card is face-down (hidden).
FACE_UP - Enum constant in enum class memory.model.CardState
Card is face-up (revealed).
firstCol - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Column of the first card flipped in the current turn.
firstRow - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Row of the first card flipped in the current turn.
FLIP_BACK_DELAY_MS - Static variable in class memory.controller.GameController
Delay in milliseconds before mismatched cards are flipped back.
flipCard(int, int) - Method in class memory.model.GameModel
Flips the card at the given position.
flippedCount - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Number of cards already flipped in the current turn (0 or 1).

G

GameConfig - Class in memory.model
Configuration parameters for a new Memory game session (player count, board size, theme).
GameConfig() - Constructor for class memory.model.GameConfig
Creates a configuration with default values: 1 player, 4×4 board, theme GEOMETRY.
GameController - Class in memory.controller
Controller for the game view (GameView.fxml), implements GameModelListener.
GameController() - Constructor for class memory.controller.GameController
 
GameModel - Class in memory.model
Core model of the Memory game – manages the board, players, and game rules.
GameModel(GameConfig) - Constructor for class memory.model.GameModel
Creates and initialises a new game from the given configuration.
GameModelListener - Interface in memory.model
Observer interface for game-state changes in GameModel.
GEOMETRY - Enum constant in enum class memory.model.Theme
Geometric shapes from Unicode block U+25A0–U+25FF.
getDisplayName() - Method in enum class memory.model.Theme
Returns the display name of this theme.
getSymbols() - Method in enum class memory.model.Theme
Returns the symbol array of this theme.
getTotalPairs() - Method in class memory.model.GameModel
Returns the total number of pairs on the board.

H

hideCards() - Method in class memory.model.GameModel
Hides the two last mismatched cards and switches the active player.

I

id - Variable in class memory.model.Card
Unique card ID.
initGame() - Method in class memory.model.GameModel
Initialises all game-state variables and randomly distributes the cards.
initGame(GameConfig) - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
Initialises the game view with the given configuration.
initialize() - Method in class memory.controller.MenuController
Populates all combo boxes and sets up the player-count listener.

L

listeners - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Registered observers for game events.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class memory.MainClass
Launches the JavaFX application.
MainClass - Class in memory
Entry point of the Memory application.
MainClass() - Constructor for class memory.MainClass
 
MATCHED - Enum constant in enum class memory.model.CardState
Card is permanently visible (pair has been found).
matchedPairs - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Number of pairs found so far.
memory - package memory
 
memory.controller - package memory.controller
 
memory.model - package memory.model
 
MemoryApp - Class in memory
JavaFX application class for the Memory game.
MemoryApp() - Constructor for class memory.MemoryApp
 
MENU_HEIGHT - Static variable in class memory.MemoryApp
Height of the start-menu window in pixels.
MENU_WIDTH - Static variable in class memory.MemoryApp
Width of the start-menu window in pixels.
MenuController - Class in memory.controller
Controller for the start menu (MenuView.fxml).
MenuController() - Constructor for class memory.controller.MenuController
 
model - Variable in class memory.controller.GameController
The observed game model.
movesLabel - Variable in class memory.controller.GameController
 

N

name - Variable in class memory.model.Player
Display name of the player.
newGame(ActionEvent) - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
Returns to the start menu.

O

onCardFlipped() - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
 
onCardFlipped() - Method in interface memory.model.GameModelListener
Called after a card has been flipped.
onCardsHidden() - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
 
onCardsHidden() - Method in interface memory.model.GameModelListener
Called after mismatched cards have been flipped back.
onGameOver() - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
 
onGameOver() - Method in interface memory.model.GameModelListener
Called when all pairs have been found.
onPairMatched(int, int, int, int) - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
 
onPairMatched(int, int, int, int) - Method in interface memory.model.GameModelListener
Called when two revealed cards form a matching pair.
onPairMismatched(int, int, int, int) - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
 
onPairMismatched(int, int, int, int) - Method in interface memory.model.GameModelListener
Called when two revealed cards do not match.

P

pairId - Variable in class memory.model.Card
Pair ID – two cards with the same pair ID form a matching pair.
Player - Class in memory.model
Represents a player with a name and current score.
Player(String) - Constructor for class memory.model.Player
Creates a new player with a score of 0.
player1Name - Variable in class memory.model.GameConfig
Display name of Player 1.
player1NameField - Variable in class memory.controller.MenuController
 
player1ScoreLabel - Variable in class memory.controller.GameController
 
player2Name - Variable in class memory.model.GameConfig

player2NameField - Variable in class memory.controller.MenuController
 
player2NameLabel - Variable in class memory.controller.MenuController
 
player2ScoreLabel - Variable in class memory.controller.GameController
 
playerCount - Variable in class memory.model.GameConfig
Number of players (1 or 2).
playerCountCombo - Variable in class memory.controller.MenuController
 
players - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
List of players (1 or 2).

R

refreshBoard() - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
Refreshes all card buttons to reflect the current model state.
rows - Variable in class memory.model.GameConfig
Number of rows on the board.

S

score - Variable in class memory.model.Player
Number of pairs found in the current game session.
secondCol - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Column of the second card flipped in the current turn.
secondRow - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel
Row of the second card flipped in the current turn.
showGameOverDialog() - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
Shows an information dialog with the final game result.
start(Stage) - Method in class memory.MemoryApp
Starts the application and loads the start menu.
startGame(ActionEvent) - Method in class memory.controller.MenuController
Reads the current settings, builds a GameConfig, and opens the game view.
state - Variable in class memory.model.Card
Current display state of the card.
statusBar - Variable in class memory.controller.GameController
 
symbol - Variable in class memory.model.Card
The Unicode symbol displayed on the card face.
symbols - Variable in enum class memory.model.Theme

T

theme - Variable in class memory.model.GameConfig

Available card themes for the Memory game.

themeCombo - Variable in class memory.controller.MenuController
 
toString() - Method in enum class memory.model.Theme
 
totalMoves - Variable in class memory.model.GameModel

U

updateCardButton(int, int) - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
Updates the style and text of the card button at the given position.
updatePlayer2Visibility() - Method in class memory.controller.MenuController
Shows or hides the Player 2 name row depending on the selected player count.
updateStatus() - Method in class memory.controller.GameController
Updates the status bar with the active player, scores, and move count.
